Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4C12 "RAINBOWWALKER-0880-4C12" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0880 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Rainbow Walker.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0880 to copy a memory block down to $01BF to $0200 that was placed there by the original loader. It also sets the stack pointer to $BE to allow for this memory block residing on the stack.
